# #123 - Jakten på dolda techchampions med BMC:s Henrik Milton & Herman Ohlsson

**Feed**: montrosepodden  
**Published**: 2026-06-05  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Episode #123 of the Montrose podcast profiles Nortech (Nordtech), a Nordic vertical-SaaS serial acquirer (compounder) preparing for a Stockholm IPO, interviewing CEO/co-founder Nils Bergman. The discussion centers on the company's model of acquiring niche, mission-critical B2B software businesses with high recurring revenue (87% ARR), strong cash flows and durable moats, funding M&A self-financed via a EUR400m raise targeting ~20% annual EBITA-per-share growth. Tone is strongly bullish on quality compounders and on AI as an opportunity rather than a threat for vertical software.
